title: Decision Flow for Java String Manipulation Methods
description: A flowchart that guides a developer in selecting the appropriate advanced String method based on their specific use case, such as comparing, formatting, or checking content.
elements: Start: Need to manipulate a String?
relationships: Flow from Start to decision diamonds
If 'Check for content/pattern?' leads to methods: matches(), contains(), isBlank()
If 'Compare Strings?' leads to methods: compareTo(), compareToIgnoreCase(), contentEquals()
If 'Transform/Format String?' leads to methods: format(), indent(), repeat()
If 'Extract Substring?' leads to method: substring()
